title: Perplexity query — best Austin plumbers (AEO target list)
html:
Yahir running "best plumbers in the general Austin area" through perplexity and capturing the result — the AI surfaces Blue Dragon Plumbing, Proven Plumbing & Air, Austin Plumbery, Brad B Plumbing, Austin's Greatest Plumbing, O & M Plumbing, citing ConsumerAffairs / Angi / Yelp. This is direct prospecting for the aeo agency: who is winning AI search in Austin home-services, who isn't, and which slots are open.

TL;DR

  • perplexity sourcing for aeo agency cold-outreach — Austin home-services niche, plumbing first.
  • Top-cited Austin plumbers (Sept 2025): Blue Dragon, Proven Plumbing & Air, Austin Plumbery, Brad B, Austin's Greatest, O & M — these are the businesses already winning AI search; the prospects are everyone NOT on this list.
  • Confirms the Austin thesis in motion: Yahir using AEO tools to map the local-business AI-visibility map before pitching.
